title: Debugging Battle Sim Observations and Tuning ManiSkill Robotics with PufferLib
summary: Worked on a multi-agent tactical battle simulator, fixing agent observations and adding scripted opponents. Then ported ManiSkill robotics tasks to PufferLib, tuning hyperparameters and simulation fidelity to achieve fast solve times on pick cube task. Discussed advanced PufferLib features including the CUDA advantage kernel and muon optimizer with Stone.
